mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO department(id, department_id, name, parent_id, type, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.departmentId}, #{item.name}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.type}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.select: WITH anc AS ( SELECT department_id, name, parent_id, 0 AS lvl FROM department WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} UNION ALL SELECT d.department_id, d.name, d.parent_id, a.lvl + 1 FROM department d INNER JOIN anc a ON d.department_id = a.parent_id ) SELECT name FROM anc WHERE lvl > 0 ORDER BY lvl OPTION (MAXRECURSION 10)
